name: McKinney Independent School District
districtFact: McKinney ISD publishes school district calendar PDFs with first day, graduation day, fall break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, staff development and teacher workdays, bad weather days, and nine-week grading period markers.

about.title: About McKinney Independent School District
about.content: McKinney Independent School District serves families in McKinney and nearby Collin County communities north of Dallas in the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Because many local families compare calendars across Collin County and North Texas districts, the McKinney ISD school calendar is especially useful for coordinating school attendance, childcare, transportation, athletics, campus activities, and family travel. The district calendar lists school holidays, staff development and teacher workdays, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, bad weather days, graduation day, and nine-week grading period markers.

about.title: How to Use This McKinney ISD Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning, including first day, last day, major breaks, student holidays, no school days, teacher workdays, and bad weather days. Families should still confirm campus-specific events, testing dates, athletics, registration deadlines, transportation notices, emergency closures, and graduation details through McKinney ISD and their assigned school.

customSections.label: About This McKinney ISD Calendar Page
customSections.content: This page is maintained by MySchoolDates as an independent McKinney ISD calendar reference for families who need school dates in a searchable format. It combines key dates, official source links, printable PDF access, calendar downloads, planning notes, and comparison information so parents can organize the school year without relying only on a PDF.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for McKinney ISD Families
content: Book childcare before Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, and teacher workdays because these are the McKinney ISD dates most likely to affect family routines.
Add Fall Break separately because McKinney ISD schedules October student holidays that may not match every Dallas-Fort Worth district.
Track staff development and teacher workdays as action items because they are student no-school days even when district staff report.
Treat bad weather days as tentative planning dates until the district confirms whether make-up time is needed.
Use the official McKinney ISD calendar page for final confirmation before booking travel, appointments, camps, or long-weekend plans.

compareIntro: Compare the McKinney ISD calendar with nearby North Texas district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Families often compare nearby calendars for sibling schedules, childcare coordination, transportation planning, extracurricular activities, and travel timing. Dates shown include the first day, last day, spring break, and other major school-year planning points.

districtFaqs.q: Which McKinney ISD calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official McKinney ISD school district calendar PDFs for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Does McKinney ISD have Fall Break?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. McKinney ISD lists Fall Break in October on its district calendar. The exact dates vary by school year.

districtFaqs.q: Are McKinney ISD staff development days student holidays?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The calendar key identifies staff development and teacher workdays as student holidays.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify McKinney ISD calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official McKinney ISD calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with McKinney ISD.
